command:
uv run python -u -c 
import urllib.request
import json
for doi in ['10.1016/j.celrep.2025.116833', '10.1038/s41467-026-70288-4']:
    url = f'https://api.crossref.org/works/{doi}'
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'neuron-channels-arf (mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)'})
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as resp:
            data = json.loads(resp.read())
        msg = data.get('message', {})
        print('==', doi)
        print('title:', msg.get('title'))
        print('container:', msg.get('container-title'))
        print('type:', msg.get('type'))
        print('issued:', msg.get('issued'))
        print('published-online:', msg.get('published-online'))
        authors = msg.get('author', [])
        print('authors:')
        for a in authors:
            affs = [aff.get('name') for aff in a.get('affiliation', [])]
            print('  -', a.get('family'), a.get('given'), '|', affs, '| ORCID:', a.get('ORCID'))
        abstract = msg.get('abstract')
        print('abstract:', (abstract[:500] + '...') if abstract else None)
        print('URL:', msg.get('URL'))
        print('link:', msg.get('link'))
    except Exception as e:
        print('==', doi, 'ERROR', repr(e))
